title: Resume
text:
Last updated: May 2nd, 2026
Resume available on request. For current background and contact details, see LinkedIn.

title: David Nobles
text:
Electrical engineer with 8+ years of experience across power systems, inverter validation, battery energy storage applications, and engineering consulting.
My work bridges rigorous electrical analysis with modern software practices, using tools like Python, Linux, GitHub Actions, Pytest, LabVIEW, TestStand, Power BI, and MySQL to build automated, auditable workflows for testing, reporting, design review, and production decision support.

title: David Nobles
text:

Hardware-in-the-Loop Simulation, Control, and Validation of Battery Inverter Characteristics Through the IBR Control Hardware — presented at the Western Protective Relay Conference, 2022.
